title: Genius Level Logic Puzzles (99% Fail)
licenseNote: Starter questions are bundled for local video generation. Buyers can edit, replace, or extend this JSON file.

items.question: You have 100 lockers and toggle every nth locker on pass n. Which lockers stay open?
items.explanation: Only numbers with an odd number of factors remain open, and those are squares.

items.question: Three people wear two black hats and one white hat. You see two black hats. What color is yours?
items.explanation: If the other two hats are black and only one white hat exists, yours must be white.

items.question: You can ask one yes/no question to find whether a machine always lies or tells truth. What do you ask?
items.explanation: A known truth calibrates the machine.

items.question: A bridge takes four people across with one flashlight and crossing times 1, 2, 7, 10 minutes. What matters most?
items.explanation: Optimal solutions minimize repeated slow crossings.

items.question: A box has one gold coin among fakes. One weighing can identify it if fakes weigh less. What do you need?
items.explanation: Group comparison reveals which side contains the heavier coin.

items.question: Three switches control three bulbs in another room. What do you use besides sight?
items.explanation: Turn one switch on long enough to warm its bulb, then compare heat and light.
choices: Heat
Ask what the other guard would say
A balance scale
Burn both ends of one rope and one end of the other
items.engagementQuestion: Did you get it before the reveal?

items.question: You have two ropes that each burn in one hour unevenly. How can you time 45 minutes?
items.answer: Burn both ends of one rope and one end of the other
items.explanation: The first rope ends at 30 minutes, then burn the other end of the second rope for 15 more.
beats: BURN BOTH ENDS OF ONE ROPE AND ONE END OF THE OTHER
choices: Burn both ends of one rope and one end of the other
Take goat first
Ask what the other guard would say
A balance scale
items.engagementQuestion: Did you get it before the reveal?

items.question: One of twelve coins is fake and may be heavier or lighter. What tool solves it?
items.explanation: Careful comparisons isolate the odd coin.
choices: Take goat first
Ask what the other guard would say
A balance scale
items.engagementQuestion: Did you get it before the reveal?

items.question: Two guards: one always lies, one tells truth. What question points to the safe door?
items.answer: Ask what the other guard would say
items.explanation: Both answers point to the wrong door, so choose the opposite.
beats: ASK WHAT THE OTHER GUARD WOULD SAY
choices: Ask what the other guard would say
One fruit from the mixed-looking box
Take goat first
items.engagementQuestion: Did you get it before the reveal?

items.question: How do you move a wolf, goat, and cabbage across a river safely?
items.explanation: The goat cannot be left with wolf or cabbage without the farmer.
choices: Fill 5, pour into 3, leaving 2, then repeat
One fruit from the mixed-looking box
Take goat first
items.engagementQuestion: Did you get it before the reveal?

items.question: What comes next: 1, 1, 2, 3, 5, 8?
items.explanation: Each number is the sum of the previous two.
choices: Force both guards into the same false direction
Fill 5, pour into 3, leaving 2, then repeat
One fruit from the mixed-looking box
items.engagementQuestion: Did you get it before the reveal?

items.question: A box says 'not apples,' another says 'oranges,' all labels are wrong. What do you inspect?
items.answer: One fruit from the mixed-looking box
items.explanation: Since all labels are wrong, one sample identifies all boxes.
items.hint: Look for the river crossing clue.
beats: ONE FRUIT FROM THE MIXED-LOOKING BOX
choices: Fill 5, pour into 3, leaving 2, then repeat
One fruit from the mixed-looking box
Force both guards into the same false direction
items.engagementQuestion: Did you get it before the reveal?

items.question: You need exactly 4 liters using 3 and 5 liter jugs. What do you do?
items.answer: Fill 5, pour into 3, leaving 2, then repeat
items.explanation: Jug transfers can isolate exactly 4 liters.
beats: FILL 5, POUR INTO 3, LEAVING 2, THEN REPEAT
choices: Heat
Force both guards into the same false direction
Fill 5, pour into 3, leaving 2, then repeat
items.engagementQuestion: Did you get it before the reveal?

items.question: A prisoner sees two doors and must choose one question. What strategy helps?
items.answer: Force both guards into the same false direction
items.explanation: The classic liar/truth-teller setup is solved by asking about the other guard.
beats: FORCE BOTH GUARDS INTO THE SAME FALSE DIRECTION
choices: Burn both ends of one rope and one end of the other
Heat
Force both guards into the same false direction
items.engagementQuestion: Did you get it before the reveal?

items.question: What number is missing: 2, 6, 12, 20, 30, ?
items.explanation: The pattern is n times n+1: 1x2, 2x3, 3x4, and so on.
choices: Heat
A balance scale
Burn both ends of one rope and one end of the other
items.engagementQuestion: Did you get it before the reveal?
